nodes.label: AI as collaborator for iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: For the logo, I might have exchanged 50 messages with the chatbot before reaching the final version

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For more administrative stuff, it's more straightforward, maybe because I don't like it, so I wanna be done with it as soon as I can

nodes.label: AI adherence to instructions
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability due to outdated data
nodes.grounding_span: It's usually when I ask something specific about Gimp or GSheet. It's like the chatbot doesn't know exactly how the software looks like, and its data is outdated

nodes.label: AI as ideation partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch hindering personal skill growth
nodes.grounding_span: I hope I can learn about photography and picture editing thanks to AI. So I won't have to ask for help every time

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: When it gives me really good ideas of elements to put in my logo, gives me a pleasant looking picture of a logo for my shop, or when its advice on editing my products' pictures result in great quality pictures, then I'm really satisfied

nodes.label: Time efficiency and reduced drudgery
nodes.grounding_span: For boring administrative tasks, however, AI will always be welcome to help me! I prefer to spend more time and energy on making macrame and taking pictures

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I hope I can learn about photography and picture editing thanks to AI. So I won't have to ask for help every time

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: When it gives me really good ideas of elements to put in my logo, gives me a pleasant looking picture of a logo for my shop, or when its advice on editing my products' pictures result in great quality pictures, then I'm really satisfied

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: It's like the chatbot doesn't know exactly how the software looks like, and its data is outdated, so it tells me to select an option that doesn't exist

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: For boring administrative tasks, however, AI will always be welcome to help me!

nodes.label: Mixed feelings about increasing AI reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I might get more comfortable on the creative side of the business, so I might ask less stuff about that. For the administrative tasks, I think it will stay the same. So I might use AI less with time, but it will still be present

nodes.label: Iterative step-by-step problem decomposition
nodes.grounding_span: I go one detail at a time. I tell the chatbot about one particular thing I want to do or change, see its advice, work on it, sometimes ask clarification or complain about the result or the advice not working, and only once I'm satisfied with that detail, I go on with another one

nodes.label: Mood-dependent task delegation
nodes.grounding_span: Depends on my mood 😅Most of the time, I don't take the time to give feedback, I just move on to the next question
